pageProps.data:
获取时间
class DefaultDateWidgetShow extends StatefulWidget {const DefaultDateWidgetShow({super.key});@overrideState<DefaultDateWidgetShow> createState() => _DefaultDateWidgetShowState();}class _DefaultDateWidgetShowState extends State<DefaultDateWidgetShow> {// 获取当前时间var now = DateTime.now();@overridevoid initState() {super.initState();// 转换为毫秒值print(now.microsecondsSinceEpoch);// 毫秒值转化为正常值print(DateTime.fromMicrosecondsSinceEpoch(now.microsecondsSinceEpoch));}@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Container(child: Text('123'),);}}
